_fee_note: Using April 2026 updated FBA fees: Fountain $7.01 FBA, Filters $4.09 FBA.

fountain._velocity_note: 30-day: ~10 units/30 days = 0.33/day. 7-day: 4 fountain units/7 days = 0.57/day. Use 7-day velocity as leading indicator — Amazon's Choice badge effect. Momentum clearly accelerating.
fountain._bsr_note: BSR 81,677 — NEW ALL-TIME RECORD. -23,994 vs Apr 17. Badge + Mallory Apr 18 sale driving continued improvement.

pl_7day._note: 4 fountain units (3 standalone + 1 bundle component) + 1 filter (bundle component) + 1 bundle. Revenue $214.96. Same dollar amount as Apr 17 7-day (Dee dropped off, Mallory added at same price). New order: Mallory Apr 18 $49.99.

fountain._note: 3 standalone fountain sales: Ruth $49.99 + Jennifer $49.99 + Mallory $49.99

filters._note: No standalone filter sale this week. Jerry's bundle filter component counted under bundle.

totals.ad_spend_note: Estimated $30/week: Auto at $10/day budget (~$20-25 actual) + manual keywords (~$5-10). Adjusted down from $35 est Apr 17 as EXP-024 waste keyword likely paused Apr 18.
totals._note: SECOND WEEK OF POSITIVE CONTRIBUTION MARGIN. $81.55 gross - $30 est ad spend = +$51.55. Up from +$46.55 last week (lower ad spend due to EXP-024 pause + auto budget cut).

pl_7day._razor_blade_note: 1 bundle / 3 standalone fountains = 0.33 this 7-day window. No standalone filter sales. Mallory, Ruth, Jennifer are future filter customers (months away from reorder). Razor/blade model has growing LTV pipeline.

pl_30day._note: Based on Manage Inventory 30-day sales display: Fountain $496, Filters $118. Units estimated from revenue. Down from $714.88 on Apr 17 as ~2 March fountain sales dropped from window, partially offset by Mallory (+$49.99).

filters._revenue_source: real — Manage Inventory display ($118, includes bundle component)

totals._note: 30-day gross profit $254.59. Down from $269.45 on Apr 17 as older higher-revenue period dropped off. Revenue $678.99 — holding strong above $650. With Amazon's Choice driving 57 sessions/day, next 30-day should break $800-900.

daily_sales._source: Derived from confirmed FBA orders (dates, buyers, ASINs, amounts). Days with zero revenue are confirmed zero-sale days — validated against pl_7day rolling totals in the history which match exactly.
daily_sales._validation: Apr 13-19 sum = $214.96 (matches pl_7day.totals.revenue). Apr 10-16 sum = $114.98 (matches pl_7day.totals on Apr 16 file).

cash_flow_4week._note: Actual data. POSITIVE contribution margin week 2 in a row. $51.55 up from $46.55 last week.

Projection: 57 sessions/day × 3% CVR (recovering) = 1.71 units/day × 7 days = ~12 units... actually let's be conservative: 6 fountain units + 1 bundle = ~$350 revenue. Used $299.94 (6 fountains) for conservative base. Badge + Wave 3 bullet rewrite (Apr 26) will push this higher.
cash_flow_4week._aged_inventory_warning: May aged inventory surcharge ~$128.84 due around May 1. ~$32/week impact starting Week 3.

cash_flow_4week._note: Wave 3 bullet rewrite live (Apr 26). CVR improvement effect begins. Aged inventory surcharge ~$32/week starts absorbing into this week.
CVR fully recovering to 3-4% with improved bullets. Search term report implemented. New keywords harvested. Revenue approaching $400/week milestone.

alerts.message: BSR 81,677 — NEW ALL-TIME RECORD. Was 105,671 on Apr 17. Sub-82K first time ever. Amazon's Choice badge sustained day 2.
alerts.action: Maintain: don't change title, keep in stock, keep price $49.99.

alerts.message: 397 sessions in 7 days (57/day confirmed). Pre-badge was ~8-10/day. 5.7x traffic increase from Amazon's Choice badge.
alerts.action: CVR currently 1.07% (suppressed by traffic surge). As traffic normalizes to 3% CVR: ~1.7 units/day = ~$85/day = ~$595/week revenue target.

alerts.message: Second consecutive week of positive contribution margin: +$51.55 (up from +$46.55 Week 1). Budget cuts + badge organic lift + EXP-024 waste pause working.
alerts.action: Continue current trajectory. Pull search term report to optimize further.

alerts.message: 21 reviews with Amazon's Choice is FRAGILE. 5 buyers in post-purchase window. Dee's order is 7 days old — review should exist or review request must be re-sent immediately.
alerts.action: TODAY: Check listing for Dee's review (Order 114-0775715-7617013). Send Request a Review for Jerry (Order 112-2924548-1803455). Set reminders for Ruth (Apr 21) and Jennifer (Apr 21), Mallory (Apr 23).

alerts.message: EXP-024 decision date was YESTERDAY (Apr 18). 'wireless stainless steel pet water fountain' should be PAUSED. Confirm in Campaign Manager.
alerts.action: Open Campaign Manager → verify keyword is paused. If not, pause NOW. $14/week savings.

alerts.message: CVR dropped to 1.07% (from historical 4.4-5.6%) due to session surge from Amazon's Choice badge. This is expected during traffic spike normalization.
alerts.action: Monitor weekly. If CVR does not recover to 3%+ within 3 weeks, investigate listing issues. Wave 3 bullet rewrite (Apr 26) should help CVR recovery.

alerts.message: 374 fountain units. May aged inventory surcharge ~$128.84 due around May 1. At 7-day velocity of 0.57/day, ~40 units will sell before May 1 — still overstocked.
alerts.action: Badge-driven velocity increase is the best organic solution. Consider a 5% price drop to $47.49 ONLY if BSR stalls — but NOT while badge is active and improving.

alerts.message: 397 sessions/week with unknown search term breakdown. Without a search term report, we're missing harvesting opportunities and potentially spending on irrelevant terms.
alerts.action: Pull Campaign Manager → Reports → Search Term Report (30 days). Negate zero-converters, add converting terms as exact matches.

kpis._notes: BSR record broken again. Badge sustained. Sessions surging. CVR temporarily depressed — normal for traffic surge. Contribution margin positive week 2. All trend lines moving correctly.
